Class WeekData

java.lang.Object
Entities.WeekData
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class WeekData extends Object implements Serializable
Represents weekly data for the restaurant. Stores the week name, number of completed reservations, and number of waitlist entries.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • WeekData

      public WeekData(String weekName, int completed, int waitlist)
      Constructs a new WeekData object with the specified values.
      Parameters:
      weekName - the name of the week
      completed - the number of completed reservations in this week
      waitlist - the number of waitlist entries in this week
